class.name: GDKMultiplayerActivityInfo
class.brief_description: Cached multiplayer activity info for a user.
class.description: Contains multiplayer activity details for a user, including connection string, player counts, and join restrictions. Retrieved from [code]GDK.multiplayer_activity.get_cached_activity()[/code].

method.name: get_xuid
method.description: Returns the Xbox User ID for this activity record.

method.name: get_connection_string
method.description: Returns the connection string for joining the activity.

method.name: get_join_restriction
method.description: Returns the join restriction for the activity.

method.name: get_max_players
method.description: Returns the maximum number of players for the activity.

method.name: get_current_players
method.description: Returns the current number of players in the activity.

method.name: get_group_id
method.description: Returns the group ID for the activity.

method.name: get_platform
method.description: Returns the platform of the activity.

members.member: The Xbox User ID for this activity record.
The connection string for joining the activity.
The join restriction for the activity.
The maximum number of players for the activity.
The current number of players in the activity.
The group ID for the activity.
